title: Quiet start to June with dry weather holding through the week | May 31, 2026
description: Central Indiana is expecting a pleasant week of weather with highs in the upper 70s to low 80s, light winds, and no rain until possibly next Saturday.

title: Two civilians injured in Russian strikes on Sumy region over past day
description: Two people were injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine's northeastern Sumy region over the past day, with widespread damage to homes, vehicles, and civilian infrastructure.

title: Why Now May Be a Great Time to Invest, Despite a Red-Hot Market
description: For long-term investors, waiting out a hot market hasn't made much sense.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi ‘more than ready’ for India, Sanga predicts call-up ‘very, very soon’
description: Rajasthan Royals coach Kumar Sangakkara believes 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is ready for a senior national call-up after his stellar IPL 2026 performance. The young batter's record-breaking run, including 776 runs and a strike rate of 237.30, has impressed selectors. Sangakkara highlighted Sooryavanshi's maturity and fearlessness under pressure, stating he's equipped for international challenges.

title: Govt temporarily exempts all customs duties on import of cotton till 31 October 2026
description: The temporary duty exemption is expected to reduce input costs across the textile and apparel sector, thereby providing a targeted relief to manufacturers and consumers.

title: NTA announces CUET retest for over 3,700 candidates after technical glitch hits centres
